summary: Mephi, a demon king, is struggling to understand his new emotions and memories. He is aware that he has absorbed demonic energy from a young boy named Elric, who is somehow connected to him. Mephi is trying to process this new development and navigate their relationship as they try to take care of each other.
key_moments: Mephi absorbs demonic energy from Elric
Elric's thoughts are transmitted into Mephi's mind
Mephi tries to understand his new emotions and memories
